issues.title: Audio notification must speak task transition messages

evidence.symptom: The Linux fallback uses ALSA Front_Center.wav, so the audible output is 'Front, Center' instead of task transition messages.
repro_steps: Run review --notify-completion on a task and observe completion_notification backend aplay.
The audible message is the ALSA sample, not 'Task done'.

checks: unit: focused pytest suite passed in temporary hotfix copy (22 tests)
regression: Front_Center/paplay audio fallbacks removed; transition message test covers Task in progress/review/done

issues.title: Hotfix scope must cover state-machine separation fix

evidence.symptom: The previous automatic hotfix scope only allows src/hotfix/ and cannot remove notification semantics from src/esaa/state_machine.py.
repro_steps: Inspect HF-ISS-COD-ALARM-STATE-MACHINE-SEPARATION scope_patch and observe it only includes src/hotfix/.
The required correction touches src/esaa/state_machine.py, src/esaa/task_admin.py, and tests.

checks: unit: focused pytest suite passed in temporary hotfix copy (22 tests)
regression: rg confirms is_terminal_completion is absent from src/esaa and tests

issues.title: Completion alarm leaked into state machine semantics

evidence.symptom: The completion notification was modeled through state_machine.is_terminal_completion, coupling an audio side effect to the canonical task state machine.
repro_steps: Inspect src/esaa/task_admin.py and find notification dispatch depending on the state_machine helper.

issues.title: Guias de uso precisam de sintaxes completas e melhor descoberta

evidence.symptom: A documentacao aprovada cobre o nucleo do ESAA, mas deixa comandos operacionais com reticencias, omite flags reais do CLI e nao esta linkada no README principal.
repro_steps: Executar python -m esaa --help e comparar os 29 subcomandos com docs/guides/esaa-cli-reference.md.
Executar python -m esaa issue report --help, hotfix create --help, activity clear --help, runner metrics --help, effects recover --help e scenario hotfix --help; observar sintaxes omitidas nos guias.
Buscar no README principal por docs/guides/esaa-cli-reference.md e confirmar ausencia de link para os novos guias.

issues.title: README empacotado ficou divergente do README canonico

evidence.symptom: A suite falha em test_packaged_agent_guides_match_canonical_files porque readme.md foi atualizado, mas src/esaa/workspace/README.md continua com o conteudo anterior.
repro_steps: Comparar bytes de readme.md e src/esaa/workspace/README.md.

issues.title: Full pytest regression after G07 completion

evidence.symptom: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q fails after all G07 tasks are done: task_admin.py has 565 lines over the 500-line service decomposition limit and filter_lessons no longer accepts the legacy task_kind keyword used by existing tests.
repro_steps: Observe tests/test_service_decomposition.py::test_service_modules_stay_under_500_lines failing for src/esaa/task_admin.py with 565 lines
Observe tests/test_state_machine_and_dispatch.py::test_filter_lessons_respects_task_kind_and_applies_to failing with TypeError: filter_lessons() got an unexpected keyword argument task_kind
